action.reasoning: Observation: Previous attempts failed because workspace scripts named inspect.py and explore.py shadowed Python's stdlib inspect module, causing circular import errors when TripoSR tried to import dataclasses->inspect. Also predict.py uses local tsr directory instead of installed /opt/triposr. Analysis: We need to remove conflicting files and fix import paths. Then test the default TripoSR rendering on a validation object locally to verify pipeline, then submit eval for baseline LPIPS. Decision: Delete inspect.py and explore.py, update predict.py and test_predict.py to use /opt/triposr, run test on one val object, and if successful, submit eval with checkpoints/triposr.
